infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Yaver uses your microphone for voice input — send tasks by speaking instead of typing.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Yaver uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice into task descriptions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Yaver uses your camera to take photos and attach them to coding tasks.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Yaver uses your photo library to attach screenshots and images to coding tasks.

plugins.photosPermission: Yaver needs photo access to attach images to tasks.
plugins.cameraPermission: Yaver needs camera access to take photos for tasks.
